productDisplayName: Peter England Men Printed Orange TShirt
description: Composition Orange T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Add a dash of humour and brighten up your day with this T-shirt from peter england's Humour Rocks collection. With a musical owl sitting on your shirt, there's no better way to spread the cheer, while the soft cotton fabric offers you exemplary comfort. Pair it with denims or shorts, and add on floaters or sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
